# title

**Instance Property**

The title or name of a media item.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String?
```

## Accessing media data

- **album**: The name of the album that contains the media item.
- **appIcon**: The URL to an image on disk for the Now Playing app that played the media item.
- **artist**: The performing artists for a media item.
- **date**: The media item’s playback date.

items.description: The name of the album that contains the media item.
